headline: UPS Boosts Its Presence in Asia Pacific With New Logistics Center
summary: United Parcel Service opens its largest Asia Pacific logistics hub, a nearly $100M investment aimed at boosting automation, efficiency and global supply chain connectivity.

raw.headline: UPS Boosts Its Presence in Asia Pacific With New Logistics Center
raw.summary: United Parcel Service opens its largest Asia Pacific logistics hub, a nearly $100M investment aimed at boosting automation, efficiency and global supply chain connectivity.

headline: Trump to Congress: End DHS shutdown or face 'very drastic measures'
summary: Lawmakers are stalled on funding the Department of Homeland Security as airport delays mount.

raw.headline: Trump to Congress: End DHS shutdown or face 'very drastic measures'
raw.summary: Lawmakers are stalled on funding the Department of Homeland Security as airport delays mount.

headline: British Airways to reward pilots for cutting fuel as airlines tackle higher costs
summary: Jet fuel prices surged about 106% compared to a month ago, according to data from the week ending March 20 via the International Air Transport Association.

raw.headline: British Airways to reward pilots for cutting fuel as airlines tackle higher costs
raw.summary: Jet fuel prices surged about 106% compared to a month ago, according to data from the week ending March 20 via the International Air Transport Association.

headline: TSA Administrator Warn About 'Fluid, Challenging And Unpredictable' Situation: 'May Have To Close Smaller Airports...'
summary: Record-long TSA lines hit U.S. airports as shutdown causes massive staff shortages; travelers face delays, lane closures and missed flights nationwide.

raw.headline: TSA Administrator Warn About 'Fluid, Challenging And Unpredictable' Situation: 'May Have To Close Smaller Airports...'
raw.summary: Record-long TSA lines hit U.S. airports as shutdown causes massive staff shortages; travelers face delays, lane closures and missed flights nationwide.
